title: felicia elongata
intro: Felicia elongata, also known as the Blue Felicia or Blue Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Felicia elongata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
